title: Create: craftable diamond
description: A create mod addon that lets you make diamonds from coal.
body:
### **CREATE: CRAFTABLE DIAMOND**
**How to obtain 1 diamond:**

1. 2 blocks of coal in a press > 2X compressed coal

2. 1 block of coal and 1 2X compressed coal in a press > 3X compressed coal

3. 1 block of coal and 3X compressed coal in a press > 4X compressed coal

4. 2 pieces of 4X compressed coal and one piece of coal in a superheated mixer > 1 DIAMOND!! (modified in v. 2.0.0)

 

EASILY automate your diamond production in Create with this simple mod!

version 1.1.0 - _and later versions_ - adds the possibility to craft coal, with 4 charcoal in a crafting table or compacting the same 4 pieces of charcoal in a press (inspirated from the mod "create: additional recipes").

 
REQUIRES CREATE MOD!
